mapper.insert: INSERT INTO AI_HISTORY ( email, session, user_company_code, prompt, reg_ymd, status ) VALUES ( #{email}, #{session}, #{userCompanyCode}, #{prompt}, CAST(DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y%m%d') AS UNSIGNED), 1 )
mapper.select:
SELECT ah.aih_regno as aihRegNo, email as email, session as session, user_company_code as userCompanyCode, prompt as prompt, reg_ymd as regYmd, status as status FROM AI_HISTORY ah WHERE aih_regno IN ( SELECT MIN(aih_regno) FROM AI_HISTORY WHERE 1 = 1 AND ah.status = 1
AND email = #{email}
AND email is NULL
GROUP BY session ) ORDER BY aihRegNo DESC LIMIT 20
